sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24996" key="diako/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διακόνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a sort of <sense id="n24996.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cake,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">156</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
